title: Still Alive !
description: Re-balance of the health system, better early game, making survival harder but not absurdly hardcore.
body:
### Requires : [Endurance](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-wound) and [DuskyWisp's Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/duskywisps-library)
### [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is also needed.

---

UPDATE : I've decided to go back to this project !
I cannot tell when will update come as im pretty busy, but for sure, by the start of summer, there will be massive updates to come !

WHAT WILL BE MADE :
- release v1
- 1.20.1 backport
- Forge version

---
# FEATURES :
## On damage :
  - Fall damage : inflict slowness (the level depends at which height you fell, up to level 3, cancellable with feather falling (each level of this enchantment reduces the level of slowness by 1))
  
  - Player/Mob attack : a percentage* of chance for your wounds to get infected (Wither II, *Depending on your current armor points, up to 1% with full armor bar, DOES APPLY to arrows)

  - Explosion : Depending on armor points for the duration, inflict deep wound (from the [endurance](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-wound) mod, only when you got less than 6 armor icon) , slowness, minning fatigue and darkness, (Down to 3 sec with full armor bar).
  
  - Fire : Doesn't extinguish by itself anymore.
  - Lava : death.
  - Starving : cause nausea 1, slowness 1, mining fatigue 3.
  
  - On shield block : inflict weakness for 10 sec
  
  - When your health is equal to or below 2 hearts : you get endurance, speed, hunger, strenght for 25 sec.

## Endurance effect reworked :
If you are about to die but have the endurance effect (from [there again](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-wound)), it prevents your death, inflicting you with deep wound, hunger, slowness, mining fatigue, darkness, blindess, weakness.

## Sleeping :
You do not skip the night but instead you make time goes faster x10 (ONLY when all players are sleeping).
You can sleep well (regeneration and speed for 20 sec), or not (nausea for 10 sec and slowness for 20 sec).

## Enchantment :
Adds only one : energize, for each level, it increases your attack speed by 0.4 .

## Early game reworked :
You cannot mine most block with your bare hands now (You will take damage if you try to mine without holding anything (except for dirt,sand,gravel,leaves and hay bale)). In order to get some woods, you will need to craft a handcrafted axe with a handle (2 sticks) and a pebble (can be found anywhere).

### Update beta 2 : 
All wooden tools are now disabled, you will need to craft a handcrafted pickaxe (2 pebbles, 1 handle) in order to get some stone and so on stone tools.

## Stacking items :
The maximum item stack is now limited to 16 for every items.

# Note :
Dead bushes now spawn everywhere, even in modded biome.

---
This mod is still in beta with many features and ideas that aren't implemented yet, if you like it, I would really preciate help on textures and translations (Any language except french, and maybe italian). 
Propose your ideas on the [github](https://github.com/ysob64/Still-alive) !
If you really enjoyed it so far, you can always donate on [Patreon](https://patreon.com/ysob?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink) !


~~Also the mod is _normally_ only required on the server side~~.

# Available translations :
   - English (US)
   - English (UK)(to be verified)
   - French (France)
   - French (Canada)
   - Italian (Italy)

# CREDITS :
### Thanks to [The-best-cat](https://github.com/The-best-cat) for the [endurance](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-wound) mod !
